mapper.select:
SELECT agent_id, agent_code, agent_name, business_scene, description, system_prompt, guardrails, status, owner_team, audit_enabled, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM ai_agent_definition
AND agent_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{agentCode}, '%')
AND agent_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{agentName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY update_time DESC, agent_id DESC

SELECT agent_id, agent_code, agent_name, business_scene, description, system_prompt, guardrails, status, owner_team, audit_enabled, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM ai_agent_definition WHERE agent_id = #{agentId}

SELECT agent_id, agent_code, agent_name, business_scene, description, system_prompt, guardrails, status, owner_team, audit_enabled, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM ai_agent_definition WHERE agent_code = #{agentCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_agent_definition (agent_code, agent_name, business_scene, description, system_prompt, guardrails, status, owner_team, audit_enabled, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) VALUES (#{agentCode}, #{agentName}, #{businessScene}, #{description}, #{systemPrompt}, #{guardrails}, #{status}, #{ownerTeam}, #{auditEnabled}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_agent_definition SET status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE agent_id = #{agentId}
